## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Ifeoluwa Adekoya for Content Manager (SEO) position at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ifeoluwa has 5+ years of content/SEO experience, including strategist roles](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Strong alignment with growthx's AI-enhanced content approach and startup culture](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Demonstrates deep SEO knowledge, editorial skills, and data-driven mindset](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Comfortable with PST hours; salary expectation \~$35-36K; available in 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background

  - [Started as tech freelance writer in 2020](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Transitioned to SEO-focused content in late 2021 at Rewrite Blog Posts](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Current role: SEO Strategist at Piggyvest (Nigerian fintech)](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [First SEO hire, promoted from writer to strategist](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Credited with sparking industry-wide SEO focus in Nigerian fintech](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Side projects in VC and insurance, creating ranking/lead-gen strategies](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Content Creation Philosophy

  - [Emphasizes understanding content goals and search intent](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Focuses on audience-appropriate language and examples](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Values editorial feedback for continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Creates \~2 articles/week, handling full process (research to writing)](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Collaborates with editor, content marketing manager, designers, product/customer success teams](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

### AI and Workflow Integration

  - [Curious about AI-enhanced content creation (key motivator for growthx interest)](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Uses AI to streamline repetitive tasks (e.g., reporting, data analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Conducted experiment tracking Grok/Perplexity mentions for content gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Appreciates growthx's approach of elevating creators with AI, not replacing them](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Work Style and Motivations

  - [Thrives in environments allowing exploration of ideas](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Enjoys solving problems and setting up new processes](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [Prefers autonomy and dislikes micromanagement](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Motivated by challenging work, drained by repetitive tasks](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### growthx-Specific Questions

  - [Inquired about content manager adaptation to AI-driven workflow](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Asked about company's approach to keeping staff updated on AI developments](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to provide feedback to recruiting team](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Marilia (recruiter) to contact Ifeoluwa about next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [If hired, Ifeoluwa could start in 3-4 weeks (end of month)](https://fathom.video/share/nRJQAufRohV_GxMcmyNDrRc5UmDkpEBA?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
